channel.title: Blogs on George Sleen
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on George Sleen

item.title: Switching to Linux Mint
item.author: gsleen@gmail.com (George Sleen)
item.description:
Recently OneDrive has been screwing with my files again, and since I was upgrading to a one terabyte drive anyways, I thought that I would give linux a shot.

I had been using WSL for a while at this point for a better command line experience, and having had a little experience with Debian on a Raspberry Pi, I felt pretty confident in switching over to a new operating system.
